title: MrktPrice cross-section payload (xsection.json)
description: Contract for the nightly full-universe metric matrix consumed by the terminal's cross-sectional panel. Mirrors the marketmap.schema.json discipline so the producer can be validated and the consumer can version-gate.

tickers.description: Universe order; row/column index for the matrices below.

corr.description: Symmetric pairwise return-correlation matrix, len(tickers) x len(tickers), entries in [-1,1].

leadlag.description: Optional lead-lag matrix (cross-correlation at the best lag) aligned to tickers.

rateRegime.description: Optional rate-regime context used when computing the matrices.
